rulings.Case Title: MAUREEN KEATING VS. JOANNE DAKE, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS ADMINISTRATOR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Strike The Fifth Cause Of Action From Complt
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 23, 2013, line 2 - DEFENDANT JOANNE DAKE's Motion To Strike The Fifth Cause Of Action From Complaint. Defendant's Special Motion to strike Fifth Cause of Action is DENIED. The only allegation in 5th causes of action that is potentially subject to CCP 425.16 is contained in paragraph 9f of Complaint incorporated by reference. 5th cause of action is additionally based on intentional failure to make repairs paragraph paragraph 21; abuses of right of access paragraph 22; threats and failure to maintain property paragraph 23, as well as other allegations in 9. "Where a cause of action arises from both protected activity and unprotected activity, the plaintiff may satisfy its obligation in the second prong by simply showing a probability of prevailing on any part of the cause of action." Wallace v. McCubbin (2011) 196 Cal.App.4th 1169, 1213. Keating provides uncontroverted evidence in her declaration regarding allegations in paragraph 21, 22, 23 and 9a-e, g. "We neither 'weight credibility, no compare the weight of the evidence. Rather, we accept as true the evidence favorable to the plaintiff and evaluate the defendant's evidence only to determine if it has defeated that submitted by the plaintiff as a matter of law." Oasis West Realty v. Goldman (2011) 51 Cal.4th 811, 820. =(501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS VS. LOUISE LOVE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Moiton To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 23, 2013, line 5 - DEFENDANT RENEE JONES and YVONNE SELF's Moiton To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment. Yvone Self and Renee Jones Motion to Set Aside Default is DENIED. Defendants failed to carry their burden and show mistake, inadvertence or excusable neglect. Defendants participated in the case by filing pre-judgment claims of right to possession and Motions to Strike. Defendants provide no explanation for their failure to respond to First Amended Complaint for 3 months. =(501/EHG)
